refnamediv.refpurpose: Makes a copy of a topology (nodes, edges, faces, layers and TopoGeometries) into a new schema

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Creates a new topology with name new_name, with SRID and precision copied from existing_topology_name The nodes, edges and faces in existing_topology_name are copied into the new topology, as well as Layers and their associated TopoGeometries.

note.para: The new rows in the topology.layer table contain synthetic values for schema_name, table_name and feature_column. This is because the TopoGeometry objects exist only as a definition and are not yet available in a user-defined table.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Make a backup of a topology called ma_topo.
